verdict_reasoning: TGN46/TGN38 is a type I TM protein predominantly resident at the trans-Golgi network but cycles through the plasma membrane via secretory vesicles before retrieval back to the TGN. A minority surface pool is well documented (used experimentally as a recycling marker via anti-TGN38 antibody uptake on intact cells). Surface accessibility is real but transient and minor relative to the TGN steady-state pool.
